positive: A majestic illustration of a bioluminescent fox standing in a misty, enchanted forest clearing. The fox is surrounded by glowing mushrooms and ethereal flora. The style should be highly detailed digital painting with a strong focus on atmospheric lighting and magic realism. Cinematic, volumetric lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoony, flat colors, simple background
